name: research-toolkit
description: Key-free research skills driving the host agent's own LLM + web tools (ships using-research-toolkit, deep-deep-research, fact-check, cite-check, deep-read).

interface.shortDescription: Key-free deep research, fact-check, and citation auditing
interface.longDescription: Run multi-source, adversarially-verified research using the host agent's own LLM and web tools — no API keys to configure. deep-deep-research fans out searches, fetches sources, and synthesizes a cited report; fact-check verifies a claim against primary sources; cite-check audits an existing document so every citation actually supports its claim; deep-read digests a long source closely. Use it for any question that demands evidence rather than recall. The using-research-toolkit entry skill routes you to the right member.
defaultPrompt: Research the current state of solid-state battery commercialization and cite sources.
Fact-check this claim against primary sources.
Audit the citations in this document and flag any that don't hold up.
